notes: Day 22 (Mar 21 = NOWRUZ DAY 2) UPDATE 8:00PM ET. Sources: CNN D22, AJ liveblog D22, CBS live, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, OilPriceAPI, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, NCRI, Iran International, JPost, Fox News, PBS, WSJ, Haaretz, Israel Hayom, ToI, ABC News, WashPost, Al-Monitor, SCMP, EADaily, The National, GCaptain, Stimson, FDD LWJ, Goldman Sachs, IEA, Bahrain MoD, Saudi MoD, UK MoD, Swiss govt, UKMTO.

TRUMP 48-HOUR HORMUZ ULTIMATUM: Trump threatened late Saturday to 'hit and obliterate' Iran's power plants, starting with the biggest, if Iran does not reopen Strait of Hormuz within 48 hours (Bloomberg, CNN, AJ, NBC, WashPost). DRAMATIC ESCALATION — barely 1 day after 'winding down' talk. Iran military responded: 'if Iran's fuel and energy infrastructure is violated, ALL energy, IT, and desalination infrastructure belonging to US and allies in region will be targeted.' This is the single most dangerous threat-counter-threat exchange of the war.

DIMONA + ARAD — NUCLEAR TIT-FOR-TAT: Iran struck Dimona and Arad (southern Israel, near Negev nuclear research center) with ballistic missiles Saturday evening. INTERCEPTORS FAILED — IDF confirmed: 'interceptors were launched that failed to hit the threats, resulting in two direct hits.' 100+ wounded total: ~64+ in Arad (10 serious including 5-year-old girl, 3 buildings destroyed, 10+ apartment buildings damaged), ~26+ in Dimona (10-year-old boy serious, school collapsed). IAEA: no damage to Negev nuclear center. SIGNIFICANCE: (1) First time Israel's nuclear area penetrated by Iranian fire. (2) Iran framed as retaliation for Natanz strike = nuclear tit-for-tat cycle. (3) Ghalibaf (Iran Parliament Speaker): 'unable to intercept in heavily protected Dimona = new phase.' (4) Netanyahu: 'very difficult evening.' (5) Israel cancelled nationwide in-person schools Sun-Mon.

DIEGO GARCIA — FIRST ATTACK BEYOND MIDDLE EAST: Iran fired 2 IRBMs (likely Khorramshahr-4) at Diego Garcia US-UK base (~4,000 km). One failed, SM-3 at other, neither hit. Reveals DOUBLE the claimed 2,000 km range. European capitals in theoretical reach. Bloomberg: 'show of missile capability.' Contradicts Trump '8% capacity' AND Netanyahu 'destroyed.'

NATANZ STRUCK AGAIN + IDF FRESH TEHRAN STRIKES: US warplanes hit Natanz with bunker-busters (KAN). IAEA: 'no radiation increase.' After Dimona/Arad, IDF launched fresh wave of strikes on Tehran infrastructure early Sunday morning. IDF Chief Zamir approved strikes 'across all fronts.' Zamir earlier: campaign at 'HALFWAY' stage.

IRGC SPOKESMAN NAINI KILLED — 7TH-8TH SENIOR KILL: BG Naini killed hours after TV warning of 'surprises.' Also: Basij intel chief Ahmadi, aerospace commander Gharish, special forces Dehrood. Naini's final claim: Iran retains FULL missile manufacturing capacity — proven by Diego Garcia IRBM + Dimona/Arad direct hits.

22-COUNTRY HORMUZ COALITION: Joint statement condemning Iran, signaling 'readiness to contribute to safe passage.' Includes NATO members, Japan, 5 European nations, UAE, Australia. Trump blasted NATO allies as 'cowards.' CENTCOM Adm Cooper: Iran Hormuz capability 'degraded' after 5,000-lb bombs on underground coastal facility.

SAUDI EXPELS IRANIAN MILITARY ATTACHÉ: Saudi Arabia declared Iranian military attaché, deputy, and 3 staff persona non grata — 24 hours to leave. Saudi intercepted 38 drones within 3 hours (largest single barrage). No official explanation given but context clear.

IEA: 'LARGEST SUPPLY DISRUPTION IN HISTORY': IEA director Birol: 'greatest global energy security threat in history.' Urged work from home, reduce highway speeds, less air travel, 4-day work weeks. 400M barrel SPR release (largest in IEA 52-year history). Supply measures alone 'won't be enough.' Philippines, Pakistan 4-day weeks. Sri Lanka closed offices Wednesdays.

OIL D22: Brent Friday close $112.19 (highest of war). Intraday Saturday ~$107-108. Goldman Sachs: favorable scenario = $70s by Q4 2026, but if disruptions persist through April = much higher. IEA: 20 Mb/d offline. Fortune: Brent near $109 heading for 5th straight weekly gain.

HOUTHI RESTRAINT — DAY 22: Still out. Possible deal with US/Saudi (analyst Ragheb). Times: waiting for Iran approval if Hormuz weakened. AP: stockpiles low. Houthis building up forces, recruiting, reinforcing Red Sea coast (ICG analyst). Possible African Red Sea bases. War risk premiums would surge if resumed.

NOWRUZ + EID AL-FITR COINCIDE: Rare double holiday. Iranians celebrating amid bombardment. Crowds at Imam Reza Shrine turned anti-Western. State forces broadcasting pro-state chants. Iran closed historic sites for Nowruz. Internet <1% connectivity (NetBlocks, down from 4%). 3,000+ vessels stranded (IMO, up from 1,000). UKMTO: 21 confirmed attacks on commercial vessels since Mar 1.

CASUALTIES D22 UPDATED: Iran 1,444+ killed (AJ tracker). Red Crescent: 18,000+ injured, 204 children. Hengaw extrapolated ~5,800+. ~40 officials killed (est). Israel: 100+ wounded Dimona/Arad (new). Lebanon: 1,001+ killed, 2,584 wounded, 118 children. US: 13 KIA. Gulf: 21+. Iraq: 61+. Internet <1%. NPR: 'fourth week, no clear end in sight.' G7 + EU demand 'immediate unconditional halt' to Iranian attacks.
F-35 CONFIRMED (D20): First F-35 hit by enemy fire ever. ~20 US aircraft damaged/destroyed in war.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 33%→36%. TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM = SINGLE LARGEST ESCALATION RISK OF WAR. If Trump follows through on power plant strikes, Iran has explicitly threatened ALL regional energy/IT/desalination infrastructure = total war trigger. Dimona/Arad = nuclear tit-for-tat cycle (Natanz→Dimona). Interceptor failure = Israel's air defense vulnerability exposed. Diego Garcia = 4,000 km range. Saudi expels attaché = diplomatic rupture. IDF Chief Zamir: 'HALFWAY' = Israel plans months more. The 48-hour countdown is now THE defining variable. If bluff: de-escalation signal. If real: catastrophic escalation.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition + internal crisis
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 27%→25%. 48-hr ultimatum COMPRESSES timeline — either triggers total war (escalation) or forces some resolution (declared victory). Protracted attrition requires continuation at current tempo without escalation OR resolution, which the ultimatum makes LESS likely. However: IDF Zamir 'HALFWAY' = Israel's military planning is for months. IEA: 'greatest threat in history' = economic pressure intensifying. If ultimatum is bluff AND Hormuz unresolved: protracted becomes dominant again.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED 16%→17%. 22-COUNTRY COALITION = strongest international alignment of war. G7+EU demand 'immediate unconditional halt.' IEA declaring 'greatest energy security threat in history' = institutional pressure mounting. 48-hr ultimatum paradoxically INCREASES intervention probability because: (1) if power plants struck, humanitarian catastrophe = forced intervention. (2) 22 nations now actively engaged. (3) UN Secretary-General urged Hormuz reopening. But Trump still 'no ceasefire.' Key: if ultimatum triggers catastrophic escalation, international pressure may force resolution.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 13%→12%. 48-hr ultimatum CONTRADICTS declared victory narrative. You don't threaten to obliterate power plants while claiming victory. Dimona/Arad = Iran clearly NOT defeated (interceptors failed near Israel's nuclear center). Zamir: 'HALFWAY' = military sees months more. But: Trump's erratic signals (winding down → ultimatum) suggest searching for ANY exit mechanism. If ultimatum is bluff and Hormuz partially opens: declared victory could resurface. Currently undermined by events.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC collapse
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED 9%→8%. Dimona/Arad = IRGC clearly capable. ~40 officials killed but command functioning (70th wave, Dimona retaliation, coherent counter-threat to Trump ultimatum). Ghalibaf and military filling governance gap. Eid+Nowruz crowds at Imam Reza = regime mobilizing. Saudi expulsion may paradoxically unify establishment. Post-Nowruz protests = key but deferred by holiday + wartime solidarity.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED at 2%. Trump 48-hr ultimatum ≠ negotiation — it's coercion. Iran counter-threatened with regional infrastructure destruction. 22-country coalition focused on safe passage, not comprehensive deal. UN Sec-Gen urged Hormuz reopening but no negotiation framework. Selective Hormuz passage may evolve into de facto arrangement but not negotiated.

theoryEvaluation.title: 48-HOUR ULTIMATUM — the war's most dangerous moment
theoryEvaluation.body: NEW FRAMEWORK: Trump's 48-hour Hormuz ultimatum is the single most dangerous development of the war. ANALYSIS: (1) THREAT: 'hit and obliterate' power plants starting with biggest. Power plants = civilian infrastructure = 90M people without electricity in winter-ending conditions. (2) IRAN COUNTER-THREAT: 'if energy infrastructure violated, ALL energy, IT, and desalination infrastructure belonging to US/allies in region targeted.' This means Saudi Aramco, Qatar LNG, UAE desalination = comprehensive regional energy destruction. (3) TIMELINE COMPRESSION: 48 hours forces a decision point that weeks of attrition did not. Either Trump follows through (→ total war) or backs down (→ credibility damaged, Iran emboldened). (4) CONTRADICTION: Barely 1 day after 'winding down' = Trump's messaging is incoherent. Markets will interpret this as either desperate escalation or negotiating tactic. (5) 22-COUNTRY COALITION: International alignment growing but toward SAFE PASSAGE not toward supporting power plant strikes. If Trump strikes: coalition may fracture.

theoryEvaluation.title: DIMONA/ARAD — nuclear tit-for-tat + interceptor crisis
theoryEvaluation.body: CRITICAL: Iran struck Dimona (near Negev nuclear center) and Arad with ballistic missiles. IDF CONFIRMED interceptors FAILED = direct hits. 100+ wounded. ANALYSIS: (1) NUCLEAR TIT-FOR-TAT: Iran explicitly framed as retaliation for Natanz = deliberate nuclear targeting pattern. Neither side has hit actual nuclear facilities but both are striking nuclear-ADJACENT areas. (2) INTERCEPTOR FAILURE: IDF admitted failure in 'heavily protected' area. Ghalibaf: 'new phase.' Israel's air defense credibility damaged. This may accelerate Israeli desire for deeper strikes (Zamir: 'across all fronts') but also exposes vulnerability. (3) CIVILIAN IMPACT: 5-year-old girl serious, 10-year-old boy serious, school collapsed, 3 buildings destroyed = domestic pressure mounting on Netanyahu. Schools cancelled nationwide. (4) DETERRENCE BREAKDOWN: If Israel can't protect nuclear-adjacent areas, the deterrence logic underlying the war itself is questioned.

theoryEvaluation.title: HOUTHI RESTRAINT — Day 22, preparing but holding
theoryEvaluation.body: 22 days, Houthis still NOT attacked. BUT NEW INTELLIGENCE: (1) Possible US/Saudi deal keeping them out (analyst Ragheb). (2) Times: waiting for Iran approval IF Hormuz weakened by coalition. (3) ICG analyst: Houthis building up forces, recruiting, reinforcing Red Sea coast. (4) Possible African Red Sea bases being prepared. (5) AP: stockpiles low but retained significant drone inventory. KEY: Trump's 48-hr ultimatum changes calculus — if US strikes power plants AND Iran activates Houthi entry as counter-escalation, BOTH chokepoints close simultaneously. This is the scenario that makes the 48-hr ultimatum so dangerous.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: اولتیماتوم ۴۸ ساعته — خطرناک‌ترین لحظه
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: ترامپ: 'نابودی' نیروگاه‌ها. ایران: 'تمام زیرساخت انرژی/فناوری منطقه هدف.' ۱ روز بعد 'کاهش' = پیام متناقض. ائتلاف ۲۲ = عبور امن نه حمایت از حمله نیروگاه. اگر حمله: ائتلاف شکاف.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: دیمونا/عراد — مقابله هسته‌ای + بحران رهگیر
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: دیمونا (نزدیک مرکز هسته‌ای) اصابت مستقیم. رهگیر شکست. ۱۰۰+ زخمی. قالیباف: 'مرحله جدید.' دختر ۵ ساله وخیم. مدارس تعطیل سراسری. بازدارندگی اسرائیل آسیب.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: حوثی بیرون — آماده‌سازی اما نگه‌داشته (روز ۲۲)
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: احتمال توافق آمریکا/عربستان. تایمز: منتظر تأیید ایران. ICG: تقویت ساحل + سربازگیری. اگر ترامپ نیروگاه‌ها + ایران حوثی فعال = هر دو تنگه بسته.
